prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical-friendly background image for a faceless short-form video.

Short title: Overthinking Breaker: 10 Truths to Say Out Loud
Niche: Faith + Psychology + Encouragement
Tone: encouraging, calm, biblical

Requirements:
- No text
- No logos
- No watermarks
- No readable signage
- Clean center composition for captions
- Strong emotional clarity
- Vertical-video friendly composition
- Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Avoid extreme close-up faces
- Prefer symbolic, atmospheric, or scenic imagery over identifiable people

Style:
cinematic, dramatic but tasteful, soft lighting, polished, realistic

Short script context:
This truth can change how you see your struggle: when you speak God’s promises, your nervous system shifts from danger to safety. Try it now. Repeat after me: I trust You with this moment. Be still, my soul; God is God. You go before me and You are with me. I receive Your peace, not as the world gives. I choose courage, not fear. I pray and release, and Your peace guards my mind. Your grace is sufficient for me. You are my refuge and strength. You will never leave me. I am safe in Your love right now.
